title: Smoke Bliss FodMap Pepper Delight
description: This fermented, fluffy, indulgent Norwegian dish features sweet red peppers and smoke, made with a fodmap-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Smoke blend (liquid smoke or lightly smoked ham)
Fodmap-friendly seasoning mix (salt, pepper, garlic powder, onion powder)

instructions: Cut the red peppers into bite-sized pieces and toss them in a bit of olive oil. Season with a small amount of the seasoning mix until coated.
In a separate bowl, combine the breadcrumbs, remaining seasonings, and 2 tablespoons of water or milk for binding.

Transfer the pepper pieces to an oven-safe dish, drizzle with more olive oil, and top with the breadcrumb mixture evenly. Bake for about 15 minutes on each side until golden brown and slightly crispy.

Reduce heat to low, add the fermented dill brine and smoke blend to a small saucepan, and stir gently while slowly simmering over low heat for another 5-7 minutes or until it reaches your desired consistency. Brush this mixture onto the pepper pieces.
